sub_pixel_system.notes: No documentation available for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Charged Beam Attack
special_mechanics.description: Jackie can charge a special beam-like attack that can be used up to five times before requiring replenishment

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Temporary power-ups that grant special attack types, limited to carrying one at a time

special_mechanics.name: Bonus Stage Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Bonus levels accessed via bells in main levels, involving jumping on clouds or hitting statues within 30-second time limit

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources contain gameplay description and reception information but no technical movement parameters, physics values, or sub-pixel system details. NES version movement mechanics are not documented in provided sources.
